visual_description: A man with short dark hair, wearing headphones, adjusts them while looking downward at a screen. In another scene, a man and a woman stand side by side in a dimly lit, cluttered urban alleyway, both facing forward with neutral expressions. The woman has long dark hair and wears a denim jacket, while the man wears a dark jacket and scarf; both appear partially obscured by surrounding signage and ambient lighting.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking clearly without any noticeable background noise or inflection.
